items.name_en: Top-tier original M82210 Apricot Print M81911 Full Leather Chain Bag Series Wallet On Chain Ivy Handbag made of Monogram canvas, inspired by the 2000s Sac Recoleta bag. items.name_cn:
🆕 M41815 Light Coffee
LOCKME Backpack
Made of soft leather with a signature twist-lock design, this Lockme backpack enriches the versatile Lockme series with a fresh look. Lightweight, feminine, and lively, it is the ideal companion for the modern woman's daily life: can be carried as a shoulder bag or worn on the back for added functionality. Dimensions: 22.0 x 28.0 x 13.0 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【 M21060 Blue】For this winter, this LV Pillow Palm Springs mini backpack is crafted with comfortable padded Econyl recycled nylon, embellished with a Monogram embroidery pattern.
